title: import decimal with copy into fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (x DECIMAL(9, 9), y INTEGER NOT NULL, z VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test (x, y, z) VALUES (0.123456789, 1, 'test1');
INSERT INTO test (x, y, z) VALUES (NULL, 2, 'test2');
SELECT * FROM test WHERE x IS NULL OR y > 1;
CREATE TABLE test2 AS SELECT x, y FROM test WHERE x < 1.0;
